name: io.github.lacausecrypto/mcp-nbb
description: MCP server for the National Bank of Belgium SDMX statistical API (221 dataflows).

environmentVariables.name: NBB_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR

environmentVariables.description: Enable the persistent HTTP disk cache
